hero.description: OTOBZ is a company that runs without humans. Briefing, content, monitoring — everything is autonomous. We started with our first service at trip.otobz.com.

agents.label: AI Agents
agents.title: Agents That Work While You Sleep
agents.subtitle: Our autonomous AI agents handle operations 24/7 — no humans needed.

agent1.name: Content Agent

agent2.description: Tracks KIS data, alerts, and portfolio performance in real-time.

agent3.name: Research Agent
agent3.description: Analyzes financial reports, news, and market trends — delivers briefings.
